title: Byrsopteris amabilis
taxonomy: Byrsopteris amabilis is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae, and more specifically, it is classified under the genus Byrsopteris. This classification places it within the broader group of plants known as vascular cryptogams. The family Thelypteridaceae is part of the larger division Pteridophyta, which encompasses all ferns and related plants. The genus Byrsopteris is characterized by its unique features, including the shape and arrangement of its leaves. Further classification at the species level is based on distinct morphological characteristics, such as leaf size, shape, and venation patterns.
